title: modules.json
description: Declares modules and their dependency DAG. Locked at end of Phase 1.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier. Used in branch names, state.json, validation contract.

purpose.description: One-sentence statement of what this module does. Operator-readable.

path.description: Repo-relative directory the module-builder writes inside. Must NOT overlap with any other module's path.

depends_on.description: List of other module ids this module imports from. The orchestrator's DAG executor reads this to compute waves.

public_api.description: Prose description of the externally-visible API. The interfaces.json file holds the typed contract; this is the human summary.

uses_scaffold.description: Scaffold library ids from scaffold-inventory.json this module is expected to reuse rather than reimplement.

validators.description: Which validator roles must pass for this module.

acceptance_criteria_count.description: Rough estimate of how many assertions this module will need in validation-contract.json. Helps the orchestrator scope phase 2.
